This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] value at progress 0.75 in animation of "width" from "calc-size(50%, size)" to "calc-size(calc-size(45%, (2 * size)), size + 20px)"
  assert_equals: expected "calc-size(100%, 0.25 * 0.5 * size + 0.75 * (20px + 0.45 * 2 * size))" but got "calc-size(100%, 0.5 * 0.25 * size + 0.75 * (20px + 0.45 * 2 * size))"
[FAIL] value at progress 0.75 in animation of "width" from "calc-size(40%, size)" to "calc-size(calc-size(10px, (2 * size)), size + 20px)"
  assert_equals: expected "calc-size(100%, 30px + 0.25 * 0.4 * size)" but got "calc-size(100%, 0% + 30px + 0.4 * 0.25 * size)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
